  • utils

    • get

get

get(object, keys, [defaultVal]) ⇒ *

Safely reads a deeply nested value from an object using a dot-separated path (or an array of keys). If any segment of the path is missing, defaultVal is returned instead of throwing.

Kind: global function
Returns: * - The resolved value, or defaultVal if the path could not be resolved.

ParamTypeDescription
objectObjectSource object to read from. Non-objects return defaultVal.
keysString | Array.<String>Dot-separated path (e.g. "a.b.c") or an array of keys.
[defaultVal]*Value returned when the path resolves to undefined.

Example

import get from 'redux-box/dist/utils/get';

const state = { user: { profile: { name: 'Anish' } } };

get(state, 'user.profile.name');           // => 'Anish'
get(state, ['user', 'profile', 'name']);   // => 'Anish'
get(state, 'user.profile.age', 0);         // => 0 (missing key, default returned)
get(state, 'user.address.city', null);     // => null
